experiences.title: Our Experiences
experiences.subtitle: Choose the perfect axe throwing experience for your group
experiences.ageRequirement: Axe & shuriken: 14+ years (minors must be accompanied by an adult). Ages 8-14: professional bows adapted to their age. Darts Pixels: from age 8.
experiences.childrenWelcome: Families welcome! You can bring your children of any age, including babies. Non-participating children will be safe with their parents behind the safety tables.
experiences.quizFamilyFriendly: Fun for the whole family! Kids from age 6 can play. Perfect for families, groups of friends, birthday parties, team building and stag/hen parties!
experiences.depositInfo: Pay only 20% deposit. Rest on site.

booking.escape_howStep3: You have 8 hours to complete the escape after activating the code. Play at your own pace!

footer.description: Tenerife's premier axe throwing experience. Unleash your inner viking in our state-of-the-art venue in the heart of Playa Las Americas.
footer.address: Avenida Arquitecto Gomez Cuesta 22, Zentral Center, Playa Las Americas, Arona 38650

common.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'd like to book an axe throwing session.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our axe throwing experiences
faq.a1: Axe throwing is an exciting interactive activity where you throw axes at digital targets. With 17+ games to choose from, our expert coaches guide you through every throw. No experience needed — just bring your enthusiasm!
faq.a2: Absolutely! Safety is our top priority. Every session starts with a full safety briefing from our trained coaches. We follow strict safety protocols and all participants must sign a waiver before throwing. Our venue is equipped with safety barriers and our staff monitors all activities at all times.
faq.a3: Axe throwing and shurikens: from age 14, accompanied by a responsible adult. Children aged 8 to 14: can enjoy the same activities but with professional indoor bows adapted to their age, in complete safety. Darts Pixels: from age 8.
faq.q4: Do I need to book in advance?
faq.a4: Yes, we strongly recommend booking in advance to secure your preferred date and time. Walk-ins are welcome but subject to availability. A 20% deposit is required at booking, with the balance due on arrival.
faq.a5: Closed-toe shoes are mandatory — no sandals or open-toed footwear. We recommend comfortable clothing that allows freedom of movement. Avoid loose jewellery or accessories.
faq.q6: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.a6: Outside food and drinks are not permitted. However, our premium packages include drinks. Several excellent restaurants and cafes are within walking distance at Zentral Center.
faq.a7: Axe throwing lanes hold up to 9 players, darts lanes 6-10 players, and for team building we can accommodate groups of up to 30 across multiple lanes.
faq.q8: What if I need to cancel?
faq.a8: Cancellations 48+ hours before receive a full refund. 24-48 hours: 50% refund. Less than 24 hours: non-refundable. Free rescheduling available with 24+ hours notice.
faq.a9: Yes, parking is available at Zentral Center. Also accessible by public transport and within walking distance of major hotels in Playa de las Americas.
faq.a10: Yes! Per-person price decreases with group size. Special packages for birthdays, team building, bachelor parties and more. Contact us for a custom quote.
faq.q11: Can I bring my baby or young children?
faq.a11: Yes, absolutely! You are welcome to bring your children of any age. Children who are not participating will be safe with their parents behind the safety tables. We understand that many tourists are on holiday with their little ones and don't want to miss out on the experience. Your children are more than welcome!
faq.stillQuestionsSubtitle: Our team is here to help. Reach out to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

waiver.title: Safety Waiver
waiver.subtitle: Please read and accept the safety rules before your session
waiver.rule1: Axe throwing and shurikens: ages 14 and above. Archery: ages 8 and above. All minors under 18 must be accompanied by a responsible adult. Closed-toe shoes are required at all times. Consumption of alcohol before or during the activity is strictly prohibited.
waiver.rule2: Only designated participants are allowed in the throwing zones. Do not throw axes until everyone is behind the safety line. Wait for staff signal before retrieving axes or projectiles.
waiver.rule3: Always hold the axe by the handle, never by the head. No sudden movements with throwing equipment. Only use axes, shurikens, and knives provided by Axe Throwing Tenerife.
waiver.rule4: Respect staff, other participants, and equipment at all times. Any form of violent, reckless, or irresponsible behavior will result in immediate expulsion without refund.
waiver.rule5: Report any injury immediately to staff. First aid kits are available on-site. Staff are trained in basic first aid procedures.
waiver.acceptText: I have read and understood the above safety rules. I acknowledge that axe throwing, shuriken throwing, and knife throwing are inherently dangerous activities. I voluntarily assume all risks and hereby release and discharge Axe Throwing Tenerife, its owners, employees, and agents from any and all liability, claims, demands, or causes of action arising from my participation in these activities, including but not limited to personal injury, property damage, or death, whether caused by negligence or otherwise.
waiver.accept: I accept the terms and conditions
waiver.submitted: Your safety waiver has been submitted successfully. Enjoy your experience!
waiver.mustAccept: You must accept the safety waiver to proceed
waiver.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
waiver.ageRestriction: You must be at least 12 years old to participate
waiver.emailConfirmation: A confirmation email has been sent to
waiver.discoveryTitle: How did you hear about us?
waiver.photoConsentText: We love sharing the fun! May we use photos and videos from your session on our social media pages?

axe.title: AXE THROWING
axe.subtitle: Unleash your inner Viking with axes, shurikens, and ninja stars
axe.description: Discover our range of axe throwing experiences in Tenerife. From traditional hatchets to ninja shurikens, we have something for everyone. Professional coaching included in every session. No experience needed!

quiz.title: QUIZ ROOM
quiz.subtitle: Test your knowledge in Tenerife's first interactive quiz room
quiz.description: Welcome to Quizzaboom - the ultimate interactive quiz experience! Compete with your friends and family in our state-of-the-art quiz room with buzzer systems, giant screens, and thousands of questions across multiple categories.

darts.title: DARTS
darts.subtitle: Classic darts and Darts Pixel - the ultimate bar game experience
darts.description: Choose between our classic steel-tip dartboards or our revolutionary Darts Pixel experience with interactive digital targets. Perfect for casual fun or competitive play. All skill levels welcome!

escape.title: ESCAPE GAME
escape.subtitle: Tenerife Chronicle — outdoor escape adventures
escape.description: Forget everything you think you know about Tenerife. Behind the beaches and hotel pools, this island hides centuries of secrets that 99% of visitors will never discover. Our outdoor escape games transform you into real investigators: solve puzzles hidden in monuments, decode messages carved in stone, and explore alleys that even locals have forgotten. You'll laugh, you'll search, you'll learn incredible true stories — and you'll see Tenerife with completely new eyes. No screens. No walls. Just you, the streets, and mysteries that have been waiting for centuries.

ichasagua.title: The Code of Ichasagua
ichasagua.description: Explore the streets of Los Cristianos and uncover the ancient secret of the Guanche code. Decipher clues hidden in historical landmarks and solve puzzles that reveal a forgotten legend.

troisCles.title: The Chest of Three Keys
troisCles.description: Wander through the UNESCO World Heritage streets of La Laguna in search of three legendary keys. Each key unlocks a new chapter of an intrigue that has spanned centuries.

bateria.title: The Loot of La Batería
bateria.description: Follow the trail of a pirate treasure hidden along the coast of Puerto de la Cruz. Navigate through the historic harbour, decipher maritime codes and find the lost loot before time runs out.

cendres.title: The Ashes of the Soul
cendres.description: Delve into the volcanic history of Garachico, a town destroyed and reborn from lava. Uncover the mystery of a soul trapped between the ruins and the sea in this atmospheric adventure.

escapeGames.pricingNote: Each phone receives a unique game code. Want to compete? Book multiple phones and race each other!

islandPass.title: Island Pass
islandPass.subtitle: All 4 Tenerife adventures
islandPass.description: Explore the whole island: Los Cristianos, La Laguna, Puerto de la Cruz and Garachico. One pass to experience all the secret history of Tenerife.
islandPass.locations: Los Cristianos · La Laguna · Puerto de la Cruz · Garachico
